summary: Merged GR stage pass touching Greens, Inishie 1, Old Kongo, Pokemon Stadium, Zebes, plus small header/type edits. The PR body describes a five-.c-file source-only slice, but changed-file metadata also records src/melee/gr/types.h and src/melee/gr/groldkongo.h. Evidence shows matching improvements across several GR stage functions, cleanup of asserts and casts in some places, and review/QA feedback focused on avoiding unproven codegen tactics, dummy locals, broad helper splits, and data/type-layout churn without evidence.

key_files.role: Greens stage implementation cleanup and matching improvements; diff shows animation table reshaping, wind-direction control-flow cleanup, assert macro use, natural loop replacement, and block access changes.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grGr_803E777C/grGr_803E77D4 changed from flat arrays to [][2]; grGreens_80213C10 uses indexed pair access
diff_excerpt: grGreens_80215D54 do/while with count changed to for (r = row; r < 5; r++)

key_files.role: Inishie 1 stage implementation cleanup and matching improvements; diff shows random helper split, assert macro restoration, removal of pointer casts to HSD_GObj, PAD_STACK removal, and fclamp0-related edits.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: __assert("grinishie1.c", line, ...) changed to HSD_ASSERTMSG(line, false, ...)

key_files.role: Old Kongo stage implementation rewrite and matching improvement; review notes directionally good typed oldkongo union access but warns that helper split and lifetime/declaration churn need verifier evidence.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Old Kongo warning about grOldKongo_GetHitTimer casting gv.oldkongo.xD0 through s32 pointer

key_files.role: Zebes stage implementation matching improvements across many hunks; detailed diff content is mostly outside the loaded excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: changes_all report lists improvements in grZebes_801DB3CC, grZebes_801D99E0, grZebes_801D881C, grZebes_801DBB60

key_files.role: Pokemon Stadium implementation small matching improvement.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: changes_all report lists grStadium_801D435C improvement from 98.80% to 99.82%
review_comments_excerpt includes truncated grpstadium QA entry

key_files.role: Type/header adjustment recorded by changed-file metadata, despite PR body claiming hard five-.c-file scope.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text says clean Old Kongo xD0 repair would type grOldKongo_GroundVars.xD0 as s32 in types.h but describes this as outside the five-file allowlist

key_files.role: Small Old Kongo header change recorded by changed-file metadata.

what_changed: Advanced several GR stage functions with reported improvement-only matching signal, including grGreens_80213C10, grGreens_80215D54, grInishie1_801FC110, grOldKongo_8020F888, grStadium_801D435C, and multiple grZebes functions.
In grgreens.c, reshaped two animation lookup tables from flat arrays to two-column arrays and updated call sites from index * 2 + dir to [index][dir].
In grgreens.c, replaced at least one generated-looking do/while counted swap loop in grGreens_80215D54 with a natural for loop over rows.
In grinishie1.c, restored a raw __assert expansion to HSD_ASSERTMSG in a macro body and removed some unnecessary HSD_GObj pointer casts around hatena_gobj access.
In grinishie1.c, split integer and float-to-integer random range helper paths by adding randi_between_f32 and updating stage parameter uses.
In groldkongo.c, performed a large grOldKongo_8020F888 rewrite; QA notes it replaced unrelated union-arm accesses with oldkongo fields but also introduced helper/declaration churn needing evidence.

PR text claims verification passed: diff check, review_lint gate, focused object builds, ninja changes_all, strict draft QA with one Old Kongo warning, and GitHub CI. This is author/PR evidence, not independently rerun in intake.
Changed-file metadata records types.h and groldkongo.h changes in addition to the five implementation .c files named in the PR body.

smart_moves.lesson: Where a repeated block varies by a row counter, converting generated count/do-while code to a direct for loop can make stage logic more reviewable.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grGreens_80215D54 changed counted do/while swap loop to for (r = row; r < 5; r++)

smart_moves.lesson: Use existing assert macros when a raw assert expansion carries the same line and message behavior.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grInishie1 macro changed __assert("grinishie1.c", line, "%s:%d: oioi..\n") to HSD_ASSERTMSG(line, false, "%s:%d: oioi..\n")

smart_moves.lesson: Remove unnecessary object pointer casts when the recovered field type already provides the correct object pointer.
Old Kongo cleanup moved toward the correct stage union arm rather than borrowing unrelated union-arm fields.
evidence_refs: review_comments: discussion_r3418272478 says cleanup is directionally good, especially replacing unrelated union-arm accesses with oldkongo fields

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not retain widened Vec3 lifetimes, duplicate Ground aliases, temporary pointer locals, or helper wrappers solely as matching tactics unless narrow objdiff/regression evidence is attached.
evidence_refs: review_comments: discussion_r3418000602 Ground* gp2 duplicate alias
review_comments: discussion_r3418000756 Vec3* vec_ptr dummy local

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a local helper already expresses an operation, such as fclamp0, avoid expanding it into manual comparisons and artificial locals without verifier evidence.
evidence_refs: review_comments: discussion_r3418000930 rejects removing fclamp0 and adding f32 zero = 0.0f

decomp_lessons.lesson: Broad helper extraction and declaration/lifetime reordering inside codegen-sensitive nonmatching functions should be minimized or backed with function and adjacent-symbol objdiff evidence.
evidence_refs: review_comments: discussion_r3418272478 on grOldKongo_8020F888 helper split and reordered temporaries

decomp_lessons.lesson: Data-backed stage parameter struct splits that change signedness or field boundaries need metadata, data layout, and access-site evidence before being treated as recovered types.
evidence_refs: review_comments: discussion_r3418272390 warning about changing u16/u32 layout to three signed 16-bit fields

decomp_lessons.lesson: Avoid unrelated global ordering or data-layout churn in a broad code-matching slice unless data ownership/layout is in scope or the match evidence requires it.

naming_conventions.name: Short role locals for direction and loop indices
naming_conventions.detail: The diff uses locals such as dir, wind_dir, new_dir, wind_done, row/col/j, and rand/diff in grgreens.c. Evidence supports these as local role names in this PR, not a global convention.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grGreens_80213C10 introduces dir, wind_dir, new_dir, wind_done
diff_excerpt: grGreens_80214FA8 uses j and col

naming_conventions.name: Address-style function names retained
naming_conventions.detail: Functions remain address-style, such as grGreens_80213C10, grInishie1_801FC110, and grOldKongo_8020F888, consistent with conservative naming where semantics are not proven.

naming_conventions.name: Stage-specific union arm names
naming_conventions.detail: QA praised using oldkongo fields rather than unrelated union-arm accesses; this supports using the owning stage union arm when type evidence exists.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.detail: grGreens_80215D54 changed a count-controlled do/while row swap to a clearer for loop; this aligns with natural-loop standards.
Raw assert expansion in grInishie1 was mapped to HSD_ASSERTMSG where the line and message are visible in the diff.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Typed object access instead of casts
assembly_or_matching_tactics.detail: Removed casts from slot->hatena_gobj access, using the typed field directly.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Risky codegen steering patterns identified by QA
assembly_or_matching_tactics.detail: QA flagged widened local lifetimes, duplicate aliases, artificial helper wrappers, temporary pointer locals, helper expansion, and broad helper splits as tactics requiring explicit objdiff/regression evidence.

review_feedback.feedback: Do not hoist multiple Vec3 locals to function scope or use separate names just to steer stack/local lifetime without objdiff/regression evidence.
Avoid local inline wrappers like getBlockItemGObj that only swap argument order around getBlock(gp, j, i)->x10 unless authored style or objdiff evidence supports the helper.
Remove duplicate aliases such as Ground* gp2 = gp unless narrow objdiff evidence proves them unavoidable.
Pass &vec directly instead of introducing a temporary Vec3* vec_ptr solely for a call.
Avoid moving globals such as block_idx_table and associated definitions in a broad code-matching slice unless data/layout ownership or match evidence justifies it.
Keep fclamp0 helper style and ordinary 0.0f comparisons unless manual expansion and a zero local are proven required.
A stage parameter struct split from u16/u32 into signed 16-bit fields may be legitimate, but needs data layout and access-site evidence.

The grOldKongo_8020F888 cleanup is directionally good for oldkongo typed-field access, but the helper split and reordered temporaries need narrow build/objdiff evidence for the function and adjacent symbols.
Manual follow-up: grOldKongo_GetHitTimer bridges gv.oldkongo.xD0 through an s32 pointer cast; clean repair is to type grOldKongo_GroundVars.xD0 as s32 in types.h and access it directly.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Manual QA follow-up issue comment 4715260405

follow_up_queries: PR2709 grOldKongo_GetHitTimer gv.oldkongo.xD0 s32 types.h follow-up
grInishie1 parameter struct u16 unk1A u32 unk1C signed 16-bit split

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, merge state, changed-file counts
human_pr_text.md: PR body and manual QA follow-up
diff_excerpt/raw_diff: detailed excerpts for grgreens.c and grinishie1.c; raw_diff truncated
review_comments.md: several QA comments, truncated after grpstadium entry
text_corpus.jsonl: changes_all report and issue comments
notes: The PR body says the slice intentionally contains only five .c files and no header/naming churn, but changed-file metadata records seven changed files including src/melee/gr/types.h and src/melee/gr/groldkongo.h. Intake preserves both facts rather than resolving intent.
Review comments are automated draft QA authored under fjooord/decomp-orchestrator context; they are evidence of review findings in the PR slice, not necessarily final maintainer intent.
The diff excerpt is truncated and detailed evidence for grzebes.c, grpstadium.c, groldkongo.h, types.h, and parts of groldkongo.c is limited.
Verification results are reported by the PR body/text corpus; intake did not rerun builds, objdiff, lint, or CI.

Some initial review comments were reject-level findings, while the PR body later reports strict draft QA approval with one Old Kongo warning. The exact repair history between comments and final merge is not fully visible in the loaded slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Codegen steering locals need evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR2709, QA repeatedly flagged widened Vec3 lifetimes, duplicate aliases, temporary pointer locals, and helper wrappers as matching tactics requiring narrow objdiff/regression evidence. Prefer scoped locals and direct calls/accesses unless evidence proves the tactic is unavoidable.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Preserve local helper forms unless expansion is proven
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR2709 QA rejected expanding grInishie1's fclamp0 helper into manual comparisons and a zero local without verifier evidence. Local helper style should outrank generated-looking expansion when no objdiff evidence is attached.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Stage union-arm cleanup is good but broad refactors still need evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR2709 QA called the Old Kongo rewrite directionally good for replacing unrelated union-arm access with oldkongo fields, but warned that helper splits, renamed locals, and reordered temporaries in a codegen-sensitive function require narrow build/objdiff evidence and adjacent-symbol checks.

source_update_candidates.title: Old Kongo xD0 typed-field follow-up
source_update_candidates.text: PR2709 manual QA follow-up says grOldKongo_GetHitTimer casts gv.oldkongo.xD0 through s32*. The clean repair proposed in the PR is to recover grOldKongo_GroundVars.xD0 as an s32 field in src/melee/gr/types.h and access it directly. This was described as outside the intended five-file slice and needing human review or a follow-up header-scope PR.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-scoped follow-up for typed-field recovery, not accepted here because the PR evidence states it was left as a warning/scope tradeoff.

source_update_candidates.title: Inishie1 parameter struct split requires data/access evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR2709 QA warned that changing the grInishie1 stage parameter struct from u16 unk1A; u32 unk1C; to three signed 16-bit fields changes signedness and field boundaries for data-backed parameters. Keep such a split only if backed by symbol/data layout and all affected accesses.
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate path-specific caution for future Inishie1 type recovery.

source_update_candidates.title: Do not use trivial helper wrappers to swap parameter order for codegen
source_update_candidates.text: PR2709 QA flagged static inline getBlockItemGObj because it only wrapped getBlock(gp, j, i)->x10 while swapping parameter order, with no source-style or objdiff evidence. This may be a useful example under matching-tactics-need-evidence or infer-authored-source-style.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible standards example; not promoted here because active standards already cover the principle.

source_update_candidates.title: Avoid data/global ordering churn in code-only matching slices
source_update_candidates.text: PR2709 QA warned that moving block_idx_table[BLOCK_COUNT] and associated definitions upward was data/layout churn in a broad code-matching slice and should be justified by ownership or match evidence.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible standards example related to literals/data ownership and text-before-data matching; not promoted as a new accepted global standard by intake.

rejection_notes: Do not record the PR body's 'five-file only' scope as an accepted fact without noting that changed-file metadata lists seven files.
Do not treat author-reported verification as independently validated by intake.
Do not infer final accepted reviewer intent from automated QA comments alone; use them as grounded feedback examples.
Do not promote the grInishie1 parameter struct signed 16-bit split or Old Kongo xD0 s32 typing as accepted type facts from this slice alone.
